chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No.D-4188 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.18877 of 2018 2. For hearing of main case 14.10.2024 Mr. Bilawal Solangi, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General, Pakistan Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for the Respondent ************ Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instruction, does not press this petition along with listed application. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
